turns.name: WILLIAM H. REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinions of the Court in two cases will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: BYRON R. WHITE
turns.text: The first of these cases is No. 88-1400, Franchise Tax Board of California against Alcan Aluminium Limited. The judgment of the Court of Appeals for the Seventh Circuit is reversed in a unanimous opinion on file with the Clerk.
